items.name: Silver Ninja Star of the Brilliant Light
items.description: In a light that casts no shadow, across a barren plain that affords no shade, range swift figures in immaculate flowing robes.

items.name: Farmer's Revenge
items.description: Protect your farmland by charging at your enemies and send them flying.

items.name: Space Sandwich
items.description: I want a space sandwich! And NO SPACE MAYONAISE!

items.name: Claymore
items.description: Favored sword of the McBlox clan.

items.name: Healing Potion
items.description: This is pretty much the best healing potion in any videogame ever. One use per spawn.

items.name: Fuse Bomb
items.description: Someone set us up the bomb! Make your time.

items.name: Ronin Katana
items.description: A ronin is a samurai with no lord or master. These desperate men often become honorless swords for hire.

items.name: Ice Dragon Slayer
items.description: Are you the dragon or the dragon slayer?  Use the special key('E', 'Q', 'G', 'T', or 'L') to emit ice-fire from your left arm and throw ice balls at your foes.  If hit, your enemy will become partial frozen, slowing their movement and doing 15 damage.

items.name: Slateskin Potion
items.description: Ingredients: one part dust from the oldest mountain, two parts dirt from the deepest sea, three parts lava from the core of the earth, and one splinter from the Rock of Prometheus. Drinking this potion transforms your skin into rock, allowing you to take more damage than the average Robloxian. It also makes you heavier, which will slow you down slightly.

items.name: Lightblox Jar
items.description: Open the jar to light up the night!  This jar of bloxy firelight looks great in places with dynamic lighting.

items.name: Torch
items.description: Try to set the night on fire! The updated torch looks best in ROBLOX games with dynamic lighting.

items.name: Bombo's Survival Knife
items.description: There's only one way out- and you can bet Bombo's gonna find it!

items.name: Bloxy Cola
items.description: Warning: Bloxy Cola may be habit-forming.

items.name: Korblox Mage Staff
items.description: Use the powerful dark magic of the Korblox to summon a row of spears from thin air!  If they don't hit your opponent on the way down, they'll hit them as they explode!

items.name: Turkey Leg
items.description: Gobble Gobble Yum Yum! Forks are lame...

items.name: Sword of the Epicredness
items.description: Click to slash, dealing 16 to 22 damage. Hit the 'Q' key, to shoot red flames out in all directions, which will slow your enemies and deal 25 additional damage!  The sword sends out an explosive neon red orb from its center which quickly expands and explodes. Anybody caught in the explosion is dealt 40 damage.

items.name: 8-Bit Sword and Shield
items.description: It can be dangerous if you go it alone, you'd better take this.

items.name: Bunch of Balloons
items.description: Fill the sky with balloons! Click to release them; they'll float up up and away! Please do not do this in real life- it's not environmentally friendly.

items.name: Throwing Spork
items.description: For the suburban ninja in all of us.  Throw these sporks at opponents for a laugh.

items.name: Cake
items.description: The cake is the truth.
